message:
type: CLAIM
files: src/click/core.py,src/click/shell_completion.py
summary: Adding validate_nesting param to Context for nested context validation (RuntimeError on unclosed children)

type: CLAIM
files: src/click/core.py,src/click/shell_completion.py
summary: Fixing resource leak in shell completion by wrapping context creation in _resolve_context with 'with' statements

type: STATUS
files: src/click/core.py,src/click/shell_completion.py
summary: Added validate_nesting param to Context (init/close/_make_sub_context) and set validate_nesting=False in shell_completion._resolve_context make_context calls; did not change control flow of _resolve_context otherwise, so your with-statement wrapping there shouldn't conflict with my param additions

type: STATUS
files: src/click/shell_completion.py
summary: Wrapped _resolve_context's make_context calls in 'with' blocks (nested with-per-level) to close file resources during shell completion; no core.py changes needed since Context.__enter__/__exit__ already handle nested close via ExitStack. Let me know if your validate_nesting change touches _resolve_context so we can merge cleanly.
